items.title: Client fetch lifecycle: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this React: Component-Based Browser Applications misconception? A fetch effect needs no cleanup because React ignores every response after props change.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. Cancel or ignore obsolete requests and prevent stale responses from updating state for newer inputs.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Cancel or ignore obsolete requests and prevent stale responses from updating state for newer inputs.

criteria.description: Selects the source-linked React: Component-Based Browser Applications correction rather than the documented misconception.
